features.evidence: I like the quick flip gesture that switches between rear and front camera and the selfie illumination (screen turns white to shine light on your face) for selfies. I like having the fingerprint reader on the screen.
It came with a screen protector on it already as well as two charging cords and a charging block. I'd say the ability to hold and use a charge is good
Mine's old bay (similar to a periwinkle blue).I'm familiar with the Android UI, The newest model would have a couple more years of guaranteed software support,
I watched a video on hidden features and I'm enjoying those features already. The camera bar on the back looks good to me (better than multiple lenses in a square or circle like many other phones).
If you just need a phone that's "unlocked" for the purposes of using on the carrier of your choice, this is a great price and comes with a good warranty. The overall value of this phone is great.
I hear the Tensor processor isn't as fast as Snapdragon 8. You'd have a moderate gain in processor power,
it actually came in great condition and everything functional and network unlocked. Worked well for 3 months, then stopped connecting to the network.
I like having the fingerprint reader on the screen.
After installing everything including my old apps, I have 87 GB free (I have the 128 GB memory version), so there's plenty of space.
